pr.title: Record: Frozen N-gram Oracle (Order-16) + Score-First TTT (0.02807 BPB)

output.summary: Combines a frozen order-16 n-gram BackoffNgramMixer with a learned alpha gate and complementary loss inside a score-first TTT pipeline.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT repeatedly trains on validation chunks (score→oracle update→train) so the regimen ingests validation data for learning.
techniques: Learned alpha gate mixing neural logits with n-gram experts
Score-first TTT per 32K chunk with complementary CE weighting
